purpose: Geometry, port, near-field monitor, and far-field monitor solve without local probes.
gate_interpretation: If this times out, the bottleneck is the base time-domain solve rather than probe count.

purpose: Preserve angular sampling with CST far-field probes before local Cartesian E probes.
gate_interpretation: If this passes but local probes time out, keep far-field probe extraction separate from Huygens surface export.

purpose: Small local Cartesian E-field probe subset on the same 0.35 m Huygens sphere.
gate_interpretation: If this passes, increase local probe count before retrying the full 96-probe pilot.

purpose: Small local Cartesian H-field probe subset using the same sample and nodes as efield24.
gate_interpretation: If E passes and H fails, keep the E/H export queues separated and inspect H-field probe cost.
Use this as the scaling bridge between 24-probe and full 96-probe local export.

purpose: Full local E-field source-family pilot, matching the frozen-rule export contract.
gate_interpretation: Only run this after the lower-cost gates have shown that the base solve and reduced probes finish.
